methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $14M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Tenna Systems, a Seed-stage defense and security company founded by Avner and Gabriel Bendheim, is valued within a sector comp universe of 10 private and 2 public peers. Relevant private comparables include Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems; public comps trade under DRSHF and IDEAFORGE.NS.

Stage-progression methodology applies given the company's Seed status and $13.5M total raised. Using total raised as a valuation proxy ($14M) and applying a standard 2.5x step-up multiplier typical for progression to the next funding stage yields $34M. Peer-median analysis is not applicable; while 19 same-sector peers exist broadly, the narrow filters (same-stage, adjacent-stage, and similar-tier) returned insufficient datapoints—fewer than the three required for reliable triangulation—making all-sector median reference unreliably broad.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $29M to $39M, with a median of $34M. This single-method triangulation carries material uncertainty: reliance on stage-progression alone leaves the estimate vulnerable to company-specific risk factors not captured by sector-wide step-up conventions. Key uncertainties include traction and revenue data relative to peers, burn rate sustainability, and market positioning within the crowded defense-tech space. Additional revenue or customer concentration metrics would strengthen conviction in this range.
